Tribikram Dhar
ProjectsCV

About

I work as a robotics researcher at TCS Research specializing in machine learning, optimal control and reinforcement learning with Dr. Samrat Dutta to desgin intelligent robotic systems.

Previously, I worked under Dr. Sheli Sinha Chaudhuri and Dr. Nilanjan Dey on medical image analysis using deep learning, while completing my B.E.E at Jadavpur University, India.

Feel free to reach out via email or LinkedIn to discuss my work or potential collaborations.

News

  • Dec 2025Presented workshop paper at Indian Control Conference 2025.
